query:
SELECT 'editions' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM editions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'daily_feed_items' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total FROM daily_feed_items;

SELECT title, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id ASC) as ids
FROM daily_feed_items
GROUP BY title
HAVING cnt > 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
